context: Tests whether the background-processing skill handles iOS 26 BGContinuedProcessingTask guidance accurately.

checklist.name: Continued processing API
checklist.description: Recommends BGContinuedProcessingTaskRequest and BGContinuedProcessingTask for iOS 26 foreground-started work that may continue in the background.

checklist.name: User action foreground start
checklist.description: States that submission happens from the foreground in response to a person’s action, not as a periodic background scheduler replacement.

checklist.name: Wildcard permitted identifier
checklist.description: Uses a bundle-prefixed wildcard base in BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers, such as a value ending in .*.

checklist.name: Unique submitted identifier
checklist.description: Explains that each submitted continued-processing job should use a concrete unique identifier under the wildcard base.

checklist.name: Progress reporting
checklist.description: Uses BGContinuedProcessingTask progress/ProgressReporting and updates progress during the export.

checklist.name: Cancellation and expiration
checklist.description: Handles user/system cancellation through expirationHandler, cancels work, cleans up partial output, and reports completion.

checklist.name: GPU support check
checklist.description: Checks BGTaskScheduler.supportedResources before requesting GPU resources.

checklist.name: GPU entitlement
checklist.description: Mentions the Background GPU Access capability or com.apple.developer.background-tasks.continued-processing.gpu entitlement when requesting GPU.
